message.content:
{"items":[
{"title":"Politbarometer 1977","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0777","justification":"This dataset includes information about government and political systems in Germany, specifically through public opinion polls from 1977."},
{"title":"German Federal Election 1976 (ZA1276)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1276","justification":"Contains data related to political organisations, government, and elections in Germany during the 1970s."},
{"title":"Politbarometer 1976","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0766","justification":"Covers government and political systems based on German public opinion polls from 1976."},
{"title":"Politbarometer 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0788","justification":"Political and governmental data regarding West Germany in 1978, suitable for coverage of the late 1970s."},
{"title":"Politbarometer 1979","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0799","justification":"Government and political organisations data in Germany from 1979, based on survey research."},
{"title":"Bundestag Election 1972 (ZA0714)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0714","justification":"Documents the political landscape and government-related organisations for the Bundestag election in the early 1970s."},
{"title":"Politbarometer 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0755","justification":"Provides political survey data about government and political organisations in Germany in 1975."},
{"title":"Politbarometer 1974","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0744","justification":"Political system and government data for Germany during the mid-1970s based on public opinion."},
{"title":"German Federal Election 1972 (ZA0735)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0735","justification":"Election data covering political systems and government in Germany, focusing on the 1970s."},
{"title":"ZA Study No. 0786: Politbarometer 1973","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA0786","justification":"Offers survey data about government, political systems, and organisations in Germany for the year 1973."}
]}
